title: Cebu City, Cebu — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]

Overview

Cebu City is a city in Cebu with a population of 964,000. The Queen City of the South, a historic port metropolis and the Philippines’ premier hub for business and tourism outside Manila.
